pub mod tre_sys
pub enum tre_sys::ExecOutcome
pub tre_sys::ExecOutcome::Error(core::ffi::primitives::c_int)
pub tre_sys::ExecOutcome::Match(tre_sys::SafeMatch)
pub tre_sys::ExecOutcome::NoMatch
impl core::clone::Clone for tre_sys::ExecOutcome
pub fn tre_sys::ExecOutcome::clone(&self) -> tre_sys::ExecOutcome
impl core::cmp::Eq for tre_sys::ExecOutcome
impl core::cmp::PartialEq for tre_sys::ExecOutcome
pub fn tre_sys::ExecOutcome::eq(&self, &tre_sys::ExecOutcome) -> bool
impl core::fmt::Debug for tre_sys::ExecOutcome
pub fn tre_sys::ExecOutcome::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Copy for tre_sys::ExecOutcome
impl core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for tre_sys::ExecOutcome
impl core::marker::Freeze for tre_sys::ExecOutcome
impl core::marker::Send for tre_sys::ExecOutcome
impl core::marker::Sync for tre_sys::ExecOutcome
impl core::marker::Unpin for tre_sys::ExecOutcome
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for tre_sys::ExecOutcome
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for tre_sys::ExecOutcome
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for tre_sys::ExecOutcome
impl<T, U> core::convert::Into<U> for tre_sys::ExecOutcome where U: core::convert::From<T>
pub fn tre_sys::ExecOutcome::into(self) -> U
impl<T, U> core::convert::TryFrom<U> for tre_sys::ExecOutcome where U: core::convert::Into<T>
pub type tre_sys::ExecOutcome::Error = core::convert::Infallible
pub fn tre_sys::ExecOutcome::try_from(U) -> core::result::Result<T, <T as core::convert::TryFrom<U>>::Error>
impl<T, U> core::convert::TryInto<U> for tre_sys::ExecOutcome where U: core::convert::TryFrom<T>
pub type tre_sys::ExecOutcome::Error = <U as core::convert::TryFrom<T>>::Error
pub fn tre_sys::ExecOutcome::try_into(self) -> core::result::Result<U, <U as core::convert::TryFrom<T>>::Error>
impl<T> alloc::borrow::ToOwned for tre_sys::ExecOutcome where T: core::clone::Clone
pub type tre_sys::ExecOutcome::Owned = T
pub fn tre_sys::ExecOutcome::clone_into(&self, &mut T)
pub fn tre_sys::ExecOutcome::to_owned(&self) -> T
impl<T> core::any::Any for tre_sys::ExecOutcome where T: 'static + ?core::marker::Sized
pub fn tre_sys::ExecOutcome::type_id(&self) -> core::any::TypeId
impl<T> core::borrow::Borrow<T> for tre_sys::ExecOutcome where T: ?core::marker::Sized
pub fn tre_sys::ExecOutcome::borrow(&self) -> &T
impl<T> core::borrow::BorrowMut<T> for tre_sys::ExecOutcome where T: ?core::marker::Sized
pub fn tre_sys::ExecOutcome::borrow_mut(&mut self) -> &mut T
impl<T> core::clone::CloneToUninit for tre_sys::ExecOutcome where T: core::clone::Clone
pub unsafe fn tre_sys::ExecOutcome::clone_to_uninit(&self, *mut u8)
impl<T> core::convert::From<T> for tre_sys::ExecOutcome
pub fn tre_sys::ExecOutcome::from(T) -> T

pub const tre_sys::REG_BADBR: core::ffi::primitives::c_int
pub const tre_sys::REG_BADPAT: core::ffi::primitives::c_int
pub const tre_sys::REG_BADRPT: core::ffi::primitives::c_int
pub const tre_sys::REG_EBRACE: core::ffi::primitives::c_int
pub const tre_sys::REG_EBRACK: core::ffi::primitives::c_int
pub const tre_sys::REG_ECOLLATE: core::ffi::primitives::c_int
pub const tre_sys::REG_ECTYPE: core::ffi::primitives::c_int
pub const tre_sys::REG_EESCAPE: core::ffi::primitives::c_int
pub const tre_sys::REG_EPAREN: core::ffi::primitives::c_int
pub const tre_sys::REG_ERANGE: core::ffi::primitives::c_int
pub const tre_sys::REG_ESPACE: core::ffi::primitives::c_int
pub const tre_sys::REG_ESUBREG: core::ffi::primitives::c_int
pub const tre_sys::REG_EXTENDED: core::ffi::primitives::c_int
pub const tre_sys::REG_ICASE: core::ffi::primitives::c_int
pub const tre_sys::REG_NEWLINE: core::ffi::primitives::c_int
pub const tre_sys::REG_NOMATCH: core::ffi::primitives::c_int
pub const tre_sys::REG_NOSUB: core::ffi::primitives::c_int
pub const tre_sys::REG_OK: core::ffi::primitives::c_int
pub fn tre_sys::compile(&[u8], core::ffi::primitives::c_int) -> core::result::Result<tre_sys::OwnedRegex, core::ffi::primitives::c_int>
pub fn tre_sys::default_regaparams() -> tre_sys::regaparams_t
pub fn tre_sys::empty_regex_t() -> tre_sys::regex_t
pub fn tre_sys::safe_reganexec(&tre_sys::regex_t, &[u8], tre_sys::regaparams_t, core::ffi::primitives::c_int) -> tre_sys::ExecOutcome
pub fn tre_sys::safe_regerror(core::ffi::primitives::c_int, core::option::Option<&tre_sys::regex_t>) -> alloc::string::String
pub fn tre_sys::safe_regfree(&mut tre_sys::regex_t)
pub fn tre_sys::safe_regncomp(&mut tre_sys::regex_t, &[u8], core::ffi::primitives::c_int) -> core::result::Result<(), core::ffi::primitives::c_int>
pub unsafe c fn tre_sys::tre_reganexec(*const tre_sys::regex_t, *const core::ffi::primitives::c_char, libc::unix::size_t, *mut tre_sys::regamatch_t, tre_sys::regaparams_t, core::ffi::primitives::c_int) -> core::ffi::primitives::c_int
pub unsafe c fn tre_sys::tre_regaparams_default(*mut tre_sys::regaparams_t)
pub unsafe c fn tre_sys::tre_regerror(core::ffi::primitives::c_int, *const tre_sys::regex_t, *mut core::ffi::primitives::c_char, libc::unix::size_t) -> libc::unix::size_t
pub unsafe c fn tre_sys::tre_regfree(*mut tre_sys::regex_t)
pub unsafe c fn tre_sys::tre_regncomp(*mut tre_sys::regex_t, *const core::ffi::primitives::c_char, libc::unix::size_t, core::ffi::primitives::c_int) -> core::ffi::primitives::c_int
pub type tre_sys::regoff_t = core::ffi::primitives::c_int
